docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZENG, YUE-JING AS TO DEFENDANT SUE YUEN, & DBA BAYVIEW LINNEN SERVICE CENTER AKA K.Y. & BAYVIEW CLEANING
